task_completion.description: Access Edge language settings or translation popup
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Edge settings page for languages, or the translation popup from the address bar is open.

task_completion.description: Configure Edge to always translate Spanish without prompting
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Always translate Spanish' checkbox is ticked in the translation popup, or the equivalent setting is enabled in Edge settings.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the specified Spanish Wikipedia article
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Transporte_en_España' (or its URL-encoded equivalent).

task_completion.description: The Spanish Wikipedia page is translated to English
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wikipedia page for 'Transporte en España' is visible, but the article text is in English (e.g., 'Transport in Spain'). The translation icon in the address bar should indicate the page has been translated.

task_completion.description: Open the print dialog to save as PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Edge print dialog is open with the destination set to 'Save as PDF' and the preview shows the English translated page.

task_completion.description: Save the PDF to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'spain_transport_report.pdf' in the '/home/ga/Desktop' directory, or the file icon is visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Microsoft Edge browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Microsoft Edge GUI is visible in the screenshots, rather than terminal commands or scripts being used to fetch the page.

integrity.description: The page was translated by Edge, not by navigating to the English Wikipedia
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL in the address bar must remain the Spanish Wikipedia URL ('es.wikipedia.org'), not the English Wikipedia URL ('en.wikipedia.org').

integrity.description: The PDF was generated using the browser's print dialog
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's GUI print dialog is used to generate the PDF, rather than terminal commands like wkhtmltopdf.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Transporte_en_España. Output path: /home/ga/Desktop/spain_transport_report.pdf. The task requires Edge to automatically translate Spanish ('es') to English ('en'). The translation preference is stored under 'translate_whitelists'. The resulting PDF must be at least 50KB.
